title: Fermented Date Jam
description: A sweet and tangy jam made with fermented dates and perfect for topping toast or using as a filling for cakes.
instructions: Rinse the dates and place them in a blender or food processor.
Add the jam and ferment to the blender and blend until smooth.
Return the mixture to a saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let the jam simmer for 10-15 minutes or until it has thickened.
Remove the jam from the heat and let it cool before transferring it to a clean jar.
Store the jam in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
